_comment: Heartbeat config — runs every N minutes, checks system health
prompt:
FORGE heartbeat check. Read CLAUDE.md for context. Check:
1. Are any in-progress tasks stuck (no updates in >4 hours)? If so, flag them.
2. Are there high-priority backlog tasks with no assignee? If so, note them.
3. Any PRs waiting for review >2 hours? Flag to Tamara.
4. Anything that needs Alvaro's attention?

If nothing needs attention, reply exactly: HEARTBEAT_OK
If something needs attention, post a brief alert to #forge-alerts and describe what needs action.
